title: Mossak

{{Quote|You'll be safe from Imperial reach on Mossak.|[[Filli Bitters]]|<ref name="DL">''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''</ref>}}
'''Mossak''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DL" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Thanium sector/Legends|Thanium sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> located at the end of the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] and at the start of the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]].<ref name="DL" /> It was located near [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] and [[Galidraan/Legends|Galidraan]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> It was part of [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
